title: Colored Obsidian
description: Adds all colors of obsidian! Including crying obsidian.
body:
This mod does one thing and one thing only, adds colored variants of all obsidian and crying obsidian.

You can craft each variant by surrounding whatever dye with obsidian or crying obsidian!

These variants can be used to create nether portals and can be mixed and matched, this mod also enables crying obsidian to be used for nether portals.
